high_consensus.description: Relayer gas depletion monitoring: alert threshold, balance check on startup, periodic health probe
Reconciliation job specification: periodic check of pending/submitted settlements, finalize stale entries, handle stuck transactions
DynamoDB conditional write failure recovery: ConditionalCheckFailedException handling, re-read and retry, degraded mode entry
Shadow mode specification for Goodhart rollout: reputation scoring runs but does not affect routing, metrics emitted for comparison
Audit partition enumeration strategy: DynamoDB Scan for distinct partitionId values for daily digest computation
x402 abuse protection: rate limit quote requests (402 responses), minimum payment threshold, CPU DoS protection on signature verification
Quality observation signal definition: explicit source of quality scores that feed into EMA (latency percentile, error rate, user feedback)

blockers.concern: Template artifacts/corruption in SDD — appears to contain unresolved template markers
blockers.rationale: False positive — TypeScript template literals ${...} misinterpreted as unresolved doc placeholders

blockers.concern: Per-pool reputation scoring conceptual inconsistency — observation signal source needs precise definition to close the loop
blockers.rationale: Addressed by IMP-007 integration in §4.1.1b — QualityGateScorer feeds per-(nftId,poolId,routingKey) EMA on each inference

blockers.concern: EMA idempotency insufficient for distributed delivery — lastEventHash only deduplicates most recent event
blockers.rationale: Documented tradeoff — old replays caught by out-of-order timestamp rejection (timestamp < lastTimestamp → drop). Bounded-memory design choice.

blockers.concern: Parallel scoring abort listener leaks — addEventListener on shared controller signal per pool query without cleanup
blockers.rationale: Replaced addEventListener with AbortSignal.any() (Node 22+) for clean signal composition

blockers.concern: x402 on-chain confirmation DoS vector — 30s blocking call ties up request thread, RPC dependency
blockers.rationale: Added bounded concurrency semaphore (p-limit, default 5 slots) + 503 RELAYER_BUSY when saturated

blockers.concern: Calibration S3 security/poisoning — unsigned calibration data could be tampered with to manipulate reputation
blockers.rationale: Added HMAC-SHA256 integrity verification on calibration data. HMAC secret in Secrets Manager, separate from S3 IAM.
